---
name: Verse Concern
about: General concern, question, or feedback about a specific verse rendering
title: "[VERSE] <verse reference>: <brief concern>"
labels: verse-feedback
assignees: ''
---

## Verse

Reference: (e.g., Romans 1:1, John 3:16)
Canonical ID: (e.g., ROM.1.1 — optional, if known)

## Current rendering

Paste the Cartha Open Bible's current rendering of the verse.

## Concern

Describe your concern. What seems off, unclear, or potentially inaccurate?

## What you'd propose instead

Optional: what rendering would you prefer, and why?

## Your background

Optional but helpful: your relevant training, role, or denominational
context (e.g., "PhD NT, ordained PCA", "lay reader", "Hebrew student").
This helps the board weigh the feedback appropriately.

## References

Optional: cite lexicons, commentaries, or other translations that support
your concern.
